name: common_sense_f8ff5871-9c4e-4206-9a27-14f461ffea8b
prompt: In a medium shot taken at eye level, a man and a woman are engaged in an intimate interaction. The man, positioned on the right, has short, dark hair with gray strands on the sides and subtle facial hair. He is wearing a denim shirt layered over a white t-shirt, complemented by round, black-framed glasses. The woman, on the left, is dressed in a black outfit with mesh full sleeves, her long, black hair accented with brown highlights, and some of it clipped at the back. She accessorizes with a triangular, shiny silver earring in her right ear and red nail polish matching her lipstick.  The sequence begins with the man standing facing the camera, maintaining a neutral expression. The woman, positioned diagonally to his right, turns her back to the camera as she wraps her hands around the man’s neck. The man starts speaking, and she rests her hands on his right shoulder, pressing her body against his left side. He pauses, looking up front, and the woman nods. She then speaks, looking straight at the man with her face near his, and the man replies. The woman smiles and kisses him on his right cheek.  The setting is indoors, with soft lighting illuminating their faces. The background is blurred, featuring gray walls and objects on the left and a yellow wall on the right. A square yellow object is visible behind the man on the right, and a rectangular white surface can be seen behind a gray object on the left. A shiny, circular object is noticeable at the lower left corner of the frame. The overall atmosphere suggests a private and emotional exchange between the two individuals.
